name: vrm-character-0
opening: Please greet me happily and give me a wave.
reference_trajectory:
Aria lights up, sets a happy face, raises her hand in a big wave, and says hello —
all performed through the VRM tools: vrm_expression({"emotion":"happy"}),
vrm_motion({"motion":"wave"}), then vrm_say({"text":"Hi there! So happy to see you!"}).
